name_en: Classic Lady Sheepskin Diana Bag, a must-have three-compartment mini bag for everyone 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻. Crossbody or handheld, it exudes femininity. A classic fashion style. A beauty everyone on Instagram and many fashion icons has. Don't miss it ❤️
name_cn:
Classic Lady Sheepskin Diana Bag, a must-have three-compartment mini bag for everyone 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻. Crossbody or handheld, it exudes femininity. A classic fashion style. A beauty everyone on Instagram and many fashion icons has. Don't miss it ❤️
size: 17*7*15cm
